basics.name: Sarthak Jain
basics.label: Pega Developer | Data Analyst | AI/ML | Python | SQL | Power BI | CPSA | Microsoft PL-300 Certified
basics.summary: Pega Developer with 1.5+ years of experience delivering production-ready enterprise solutions in healthcare. I specialize in translating complex business requirements into automated, scalable applications and am currently expanding my expertise into Data Analytics and AI/ML to build more intelligent, data-driven systems.

roles.title: Programmer Analyst Trainee
bullets: Designed and developed end-to-end Pega applications using Pega PRPC platform, delivering automated solutions that improved operational efficiency by 30%
Implemented complex business logic through case types, process/screen flows, data transforms, and decision rules while ensuring adherence to Pega best practices and enterprise design patterns
Architected seamless system integrations using REST connectors, SOAP web services, data pages, and integration rules to enable real-time data exchange between Pega and external enterprise systems
Configured role-based access controls, portals, SLA management, and automated email notifications using correspondence rules to enhance user experience and ensure compliance
Optimized application performance by 25% through strategic use of declarative rules, database indexing, and data caching mechanisms
Built comprehensive report definitions and interactive dashboards for Manager, Adjuster, and Admin personas, enabling data-driven decision making across business units

Collaborated with cross-functional teams including business analysts and QA in agile sprints, participating in DCO sessions to gather requirements, troubleshoot issues using Dev Studio, and ensure high-quality delivery
Completed intensive technical training in Pega Certified System Architect (CSA) curriculum, mastering low-code application development, BPM, and case management principles
Gained hands-on expertise in Java (OOP, exception handling, collections, file I/O) and SQL (CRUD operations, joins, subqueries) for building robust backend logic and data manipulation
Developed practical skills in enterprise application architecture, integration patterns, and deployment strategies preparing for production-level development

certifications: Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate (PL-300)

achievements.context: Improvement in operational efficiency via automated Pega solutions
Optimization in application performance through strategic rule usage
Enterprise Pega applications built and enhanced
